summary: Tested granular permissions, role updates, customer Potansiyel (k€) UI, and filter operators. Backend: 10/10 pytest pass (100%). Frontend: all primary flows verified — admin login, Dashboard 'Düzenle' button visible, Kullanıcı Yönetimi shows 4 users with both 'Silme' and 'Dashboard Düzenleme' switches (admin disabled+checked, non-admin togglable), Customers list shows both 'Potansiyel Seviye' and 'Potansiyel (k€)' columns with values like 200/100/150 k€, CustomerEditModal has 'Potansiyel (k€)' label + potential-value-input + k€ suffix, CustomerDetail modal shows 'Potansiyel (k€)' heading with '200 k€' value. Advanced-filter UI interaction via Playwright was inconclusive due to many similar combobox selectors on the page, but code review confirms FILTER_FIELDS contains potential_value(type=number) and OPERATORS includes greater_than/less_than (Büyüktür/Küçüktür) and backend filter logic verified by tests.
passed_tests: BACKEND /api/auth/login (admin.test) returns session_token; /api/auth/me returns is_admin=true and permissions={can_delete:true,can_edit_dashboard:true}
BACKEND GET /api/users returns 4 users, each with permissions dict and is_admin boolean; admin emails have all permissions=true
BACKEND PATCH /api/users/{id}/permissions with {can_delete:true} persists; GET /api/users/{id}/permissions returns updated value; toggle off also works
BACKEND PATCH /api/users/{id}/role?role=admin (query) succeeds; PATCH with {role:'admin'} body succeeds; PUT body also succeeds
BACKEND DELETE /api/customers/{fake_id} without auth returns 401/403; admin call returns 404 (not 403) — permission gate correct
BACKEND POST /api/filters + /api/filters/{id}/apply with operator=greater_than value='100' returns only customers with potential_value > 100; less_than mirrors correctly
FRONTEND Admin login lands on dashboard; dashboard-edit-toggle 'Düzenle' visible for admin

FRONTEND /users page renders 4 rows; 4 perm-switch-can_delete-* and 4 perm-switch-can_edit_dashboard-* switches; admin row switch disabled+checked; non-admin row toggle changes data-state unchecked->checked and persists
FRONTEND /customers list shows column headers 'Potansiyel Seviye' and 'Potansiyel (k€)' side by side; potential-value-cell renders values formatted as '200 k€', '100 k€', '150 k€'
FRONTEND CustomerEditModal (opened via 'Yeni Müşteri') has 'Potansiyel (k€)' label, [data-testid=potential-value-input] present, and k€ suffix rendered next to input
FRONTEND CustomerDetail (click row) shows 'Potansiyel (k€)' heading and value '200 k€' for Mavitec Makina
action_items: OPTIONAL: Add data-testid='advanced-filter-button' and per-row data-testid='filter-condition-field/operator/value' on FilterPanel to make Playwright tests of advanced filter more deterministic (currently 38 role=combobox elements on the page conflict during selection).

OPTIONAL: Main agent may want to do a quick manual verification of advanced filter: open /customers → Filtre → field='Potansiyel (k€)', operator='Büyüktür', value=100, Apply — backend logic for this path is verified green by tests.
critical_code_review_comments: GOOD: server.py PATCH /users/{id}/role accepts BOTH query param `?role=` AND body `{role:...}` AND both PUT+PATCH HTTP verbs — backwards compatible with old/new frontend.
GOOD: get_user_permissions() returns default-false dict for all ALL_PERMISSION_KEYS so frontend can safely read permissions.can_delete/.can_edit_dashboard without undefined checks.
GOOD: check_admin_permission short-circuits for ADMIN_EMAIL and role==admin so removing per-user toggle never locks out admins.
GOOD: SavedFilter.conditions[].value is typed as str but matches_condition() casts to float for greater_than/less_than — tolerant of mixed types.
NIT: Customers.jsx is ~2117 lines — exceeds 700-line guideline; recommend splitting FILTER_FIELDS/OPERATORS into a separate module and extracting FilterPanel into its own component.

NIT: server.py /api/filters/{id}/apply loads ALL customers into memory and filters in Python — fine for 2.7k but will scale poorly past ~50k. Consider pushing greater_than/less_than to Supabase query.
NIT: matches_condition treats None as 0 for less_than — customers with NULL potential_value pass `< 100` filter. May be unexpected for users; consider treating None as exclude.
NIT: FilterPanel SelectTriggers have no data-testid — makes E2E testing brittle.

success_rate.frontend: 90% — all UI elements verified except advanced-filter dropdown interaction (code-reviewed instead)

seed_data_creation: TEST_pv_greater_than_100 and TEST_pv_less_than_100 saved filters created and deleted in teardown. Non-admin permission toggle (fuurkannn354@gmail.com can_delete) was flipped on then off during test cleanup, but may have residual ON state if last test didn't revert — confirm by inspecting /app/backend/user_permissions.json or via Kullanıcı Yönetimi UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_permissions_and_potential.py is reusable for regression. For Playwright filter testing, the 'Filtre' button is a Popover (not Dialog) — use [data-testid='advanced-filter-button'] if main agent adds it, else target by surrounding context. Note: page has many inline Select triggers (one per row for Durum/Arama columns), so direct combobox querying is unreliable.
rca of the issue: No functional bugs found. All requested behavior implemented correctly: granular permissions persist to /app/backend/user_permissions.json, admin always returns true for all perms, role update accepts both PUT/PATCH+query/body, DELETE gated by check_permission(can_delete), Customers UI shows Potansiyel (k€) column + k€ suffix in edit modal + heading on detail page, filter operators greater_than/less_than work via saved-filter apply path.
